title: Projects API client for managing registered projects
purpose: Provides HTTP fetch methods to list, register, and unregister projects with the backend API.
module_context: Exports a projectsApi object with three async methods for project management operations.

steps.content: Send a GET request to the projects endpoint.
IF the response indicates failure, throw an error with the status text.
Parse the JSON response from the server.
Extract and return the projects array from the response data.

methods.name: register
methods.normalized_params: (path: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; project?: Project; error?: string }>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the projects endpoint with the project path in the body.
Parse the JSON response from the server.
IF the response indicates failure, return a failure result with the error message.
ELSE return a success result with the registered project data.
Encode the project path for use in a URL query parameter.
Send a DELETE request to the projects endpoint with the path as a query parameter.
Parse the JSON response from the server.
IF the response indicates failure, return a failure result.
ELSE return a success result based on the server's success indicator.
